response.original_title: La vida de Chiclín en el ecran
response.overview: In one corner of the room, a cinematographic apparatus had been installed, graciously loaned by the Lima Theater and Cinema Company, and at the back a screen, on which was projected the beautiful and detailed film that Mr. Larco had impressed some years ago and which reproduces in all its aspects the development of agricultural work on the great Chiclín estate and very interesting facets of social life in the town adjacent to the estate, especially drawing attention to the scenes of the celebration of the national holidays in a brilliant manner on the estate.
response.title: La vida de Chiclín en el ecran
